title: AI Filmmaking Tutorial: Character Consistency Fixed!
summary: ImagineArt Film Studio is an AI video generation tool that addresses character consistency across shots through storyboard mode and preset-based multi-shot generation. The platform includes built-in timeline editing and enables users to produce short films without external software like Premiere or After Effects.
